series_metadata.series_title: Status Report Files for State Accounts
series_metadata.series_description: Files created weekly and monthly for internal tracking purposes for the Trust Department. These documents reflect the status of the investment compliance reviews, changes to the automated daily compliance rules, and other relevant portfolio reporting.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 4 fiscal years. ; Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 4 fiscal years
